debug_info.goal:
case swap
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
x y : α
l : List α
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (y :: x :: l).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: y :: l).length},
    (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] → ((y :: x :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

failed_attempts:
rintro ⟨ _ | _ | i, hi ⟩ ⟨ _ | _ | j, hj ⟩ <;> simp_all +decide [ List.get ]
          · intro h
            induction' l with hd tl ih generalizing j <;> simp_all +decide [ List.eraseIdx ]
            · contradiction
            · rcases j with ( _ | j ) <;> simp_all +decide [ List.get ]
              specialize ih _ ( by simpa using hj ) rfl
              exact List.Perm.trans ( List.Perm.cons _ ih ) ( List.Perm.swap .. )
          · intro h; rw [ eq_comm ] at h; simp_all +decide [ List.perm_iff_count ]
            have h_perm : List.Perm (y :: l) (y :: x :: l.eraseIdx j) := by
              have h_perm_step : List.Perm (x :: l.eraseIdx j) (l) := by
                grind +suggestions
              exact List.Perm.cons _ h_perm_step.symm
            exact h_perm.trans ( List.Perm.swap .. )
          · grind +suggestions
          · intro h
            have h_perm : List.Perm (y :: x :: l.eraseIdx i) (x :: y :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
              exact List.Perm.swap x y (l.eraseIdx i)
            convert h_perm.trans _ using 1
            convert List.Perm.cons _ _ using 1
            grind +suggestions
          · intro h; exact (by
            have h_swap : List.Perm (y :: x :: l.eraseIdx i) (x :: y :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
              exact List.Perm.swap ..
            generalize_proofs at *; (
            have h_erase : List.Perm (l.eraseIdx i) (l.eraseIdx j) := by
              have h_eq : List.Perm (l.eraseIdx i ++ [l[i]]) (l.eraseIdx j ++ [l[j]]) := by
                have h_eq : List.Perm (l.eraseIdx i ++ [l[i]]) l ∧ List.Perm (l.eraseIdx j ++ [l[j]]) l := by
                  have h_eq : ∀ (l : List α) (i : ℕ) (hi : i < l.length), List.Perm (l.eraseIdx i ++ [l[i]]) l := by
                    intro l i hi; induction' l with hd tl ih generalizing i <;> simp_all +decide [ List.eraseIdx ]
                    · contradiction
                    · rcases i with ( _ | i ) <;> simp_all +decide [ List.eraseIdx ]
                  generalize_proofs at *; (
                  exact ⟨ h_eq l i ‹_›, h_eq l j ‹_› ⟩)
                generalize_proofs at *; (
                exact h_eq.1.trans h_eq.2.symm)
              simp_all +decide [ List.perm_iff_count ]
              exact (List.perm_append_right_iff [l[j]]).mp h_eq
            generalize_proofs at *; (
            exact h_swap.trans ( List.Perm.cons _ ( List.Perm.cons _ h_erase ) ))))
